description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark gray gable roof and a clean, rectangular structure. The front facade features large windows and a main entryway flanked by two small palm trees, set on a paved area. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious green lawn with a uniquely shaped swimming pool, two lounge chairs, and a driveway with a parked car. The side elevations show a mix of large and small windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection to outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gray gable roof, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool and lounge area. The exterior is light-colored with clean lines and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two palm trees, large windows, and a paved entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, multiple windows, and a glimpse of the backyard with pool and lounge chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, a car on the driveway, and large glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the lawn, and the pool area extending from the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal groupings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, flanked by two palm trees, set on a paved area with no porch or overhang.
